gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, checking the health and metrics of all the apps in our community greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS registry.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest usage statistics and health statuses.
gist.visual_concept: Monitor Robot acting as a gardener, checking on the health of various code-plants (representing community apps) in a greenhouse, while Polly the bee assists with a watering can.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The friendly bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting glowing code-plants in a greenhouse. The friendly bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
